economic_notes: Rainbow Gas Bar ceased operations June 25, 2021 subsequent to year end. Burns Lake Community Forest generating revenue. Coastal Gas Link revenue received. Nations Cannabis Holdings LP investment fully impaired in prior year ($1,500,000). Key-oh Lodge room sales operations ongoing. Turtle Island Land Management Corporation Ltd. inactive GBE.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify completeness of Rainbow Gas Bar sales and inability to observe physical inventory counts at March 31, 2021 (and 2020). Rainbow Gas Bar ceased operations June 25, 2021 subsequent to year end with potential contaminated site liability unquantified. Nations Cannabis Holdings LP investment of $1,500,000 was fully impaired in FY2020 as a one-time item in prior year. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $1,122,101 + CMHC $1,109,284 + Province of BC $2,491,073 + MCFD $433,817 + FHNA $110,288 + Carrier Sekani Family Services $192,623 + PGNAETA $36,731 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $5,500 + BCFNGRS LP $285,496 = $5,786,913 plus Ottawa Trust Fund $46,383 = $5,833,296; OSR includes Key-oh Lodge, Rainbow Gas Bar, Rental income, Taxation, Other income. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Consolidated entities include Ts'il Kaz Koh Development Corporation (100%) and Ts'il Kaz Koh Development Limited Partnership (75% proportionate). GBE: Turtle Island Land Management Corporation Ltd. (100%, inactive, modified equity). Financial statements dated February 9, 2023 for year ended March 31, 2021 — significant delay in filing.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
